Name: NEON Bartlett Experimental Forest (BART)
IGBP description: Deciduous Broadleaf Forests: Lands dominated by woody vegetation with a percent cover >60% and height exceeding 2 meters.  Consists of broadleaf tree communities with an annual cycle of leaf-on and leaf-off periods.
koppen description: Warm Summer Continental: significant precipitation in all seasons

Name: NEON Dakota Coteau Field School (DCFS)
IGBP description: Grasslands: Lands with herbaceous types of cover. Tree and shrub cover is less than 10%. Permanent wetlands lands with a permanent mixture of water and herbaceous or woody vegetation. The vegetation can be present in either salt, brackish, or fresh water.
koppen description: Warm Summer Continental: significant precipitation in all seasons

Name: NEON Delta Junction (DEJU)
IGBP description: Evergreen Needleleaf Forests: Lands dominated by woody vegetation with a percent cover >60% and height exceeding 2 meters. Almost all trees remain green all year. Canopy is never without green foliage.
koppen description: Subarctic: severe winter, no dry season, cool summer

Name: NEON Dead Lake (DELA)
IGBP description: Mixed Forests: Lands dominated by trees with a percent cover >60% and height exceeding 2 meters.  Consists of tree communities with interspersed mixtures or mosaics of the other four forest types.  None of the forest types exceeds 60% of landscape.
koppen description: Humid Subtropical: mild with no dry season, hot summer

Name: NEON Disney Wilderness Preserve (DSNY)
IGBP description: Cropland/Natural Vegetation Mosaics: Lands with a mosaic of croplands, forest, shrublands, and grasslands in which no one component comprises more than 60% of the landscape
koppen description: Humid Subtropical: mild with no dry season, hot summer
